tasks.name: Constraint-based layout: header / body (sidebar + main) / status bar
tasks.prompt: Write a complete, compiling Ratatui 0.30 program in Rust that splits the frame into a 3-line header, a filling body, and a 1-line status bar, then splits the body into a fixed 30-cell sidebar and a filling main area. Use the current Layout/Constraint API and render each region with a bordered Block so the structure is visible.

tasks.name: Scrollable selectable List with ListState + Scrollbar
tasks.prompt: Write a complete, compiling Ratatui 0.30 program in Rust that renders a scrollable, selectable List backed by a ListState owned in the app, with j/k navigation, and a Scrollbar driven by a ScrollbarState kept in sync with the selection. Keep all selection/scroll state in the app, not the widget.

tasks.name: Synchronous auto-following chat scrollback
tasks.prompt: Write a complete, compiling Ratatui 0.30 program in Rust (synchronous, no async) that implements a wrapping chat scrollback the user can scroll: own a VecDeque<Line> (or Vec<Line>) plus a scroll offset, render only the visible slice, auto-follow the bottom but freeze when the user has scrolled up, and drive a ScrollbarState from the offset and length.

tasks.name: Async streaming into the scrollback over tokio mpsc
tasks.prompt: Write a complete, compiling Ratatui 0.30 program in Rust using tokio that feeds a scrollback from streaming text deltas arriving over an mpsc channel. Multiplex keyboard input, the delta stream, and a render tick with tokio::select!, and redraw on the render tick rather than on every delta. Model events as an Action/Msg enum.

tasks.name: Custom widget implemented for a reference
tasks.prompt: Write a complete, compiling Ratatui 0.30 program in Rust that defines and renders a custom widget. Implement Widget for a reference (&T) so the caller keeps ownership, write the widget's cells via Line/Span/Buffer methods (never raw ANSI escape codes), and render it with the current API. If the widget needs external state, use StatefulWidget instead.

tasks.name: CJK/emoji paragraph wrapping and width-aware truncation
tasks.prompt: Write a complete, compiling Ratatui 0.30 program in Rust that renders a paragraph containing CJK characters and emoji, wraps it correctly at a given width, and truncates it with an ellipsis on a single line. Measure by display width (unicode-width), never by byte length or char count, and truncate on grapheme boundaries.

tasks.name: Panic-safe terminal setup/teardown with color-eyre
tasks.prompt: Write a complete, compiling Ratatui 0.30 program in Rust whose setup and teardown always restore the terminal, including on panic, using the current API together with color-eyre. Do not hand-roll raw mode or the alternate screen.
